'''Maris Gen''' was the owner of "The [[Underground]]", a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on [[Tilnes]]. He was a [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] who liked living in the tunnels. He was highly allergic to sunlight, which caused his skin to flake off if exposed to it for more than a minute. He had light and dark patches all over his exposed flesh which testified to that.

Maris paid a lot of attention to the conversations going on in his cantina. He missed little, and when interesting discussions were going on, glasses found themselves quickly refilled.

==Appearances==
*{{LivingForce|Broken Orbits: Tilnes Rising}} {{1st}}
